items.title: Three renamed Fabric artifacts still named by old names across portfolio docs
items.description: README, docs/ and commands still name three renamed Fabric artifacts (semantic model, cleaning notebook, report) by their old archived names as 'active'; the spec was fixed but the cross-surface doc sweep was never completed.
items.fix_one_liner: Sweep old->new names for 3 artifacts across non-spec docs/commands, preserving historical/convention/activity-name references (per-file judgment; >20 files).

sub_instances.note: Flagged by 2026-05-17 audit; spec fixed (L82/L726); cross-surface sweep never completed.

FB-001 swapped the 4 spec references; the ~36 doc/command references were never swept. Preserve the pipeline ACTIVITY name 'clean_columnsAndHeaders' in error_handling_strategy.md and naming-convention discussions.
README:36, project_definition.md:823, fabric-artifacts-inventory.md:85, PORTFOLIO_ASSETS_README.md, dax_measures.md, etc.

items.pending_work_dedupe_note: NOT suppressed to task-010 despite FR-001.task_id==task-010: task-010 is 'Configure Pipeline Scheduling' and FR-001 explicitly scopes the sweep out of it. No pending task touches these surfaces.

fix_eligibility.reason: >3 files and per-file judgment required (exclude historical/convention/activity-name refs); fails bundle criteria (e) bounded-scope and (d)/(g) no-judgment. No inline [Fix it]; route via triage or a /work task.

items.title: EU supply-shares bronze table named two ways in spec
items.description: spec_v1.md names the EU CRM bronze table bronze_GlobalSupplyShares in Data Architecture/Transformations but bronze_EUSupplyShares in Orchestration (L626) — the bronze->silver lineage is ambiguous.
items.fix_one_liner: Spec amendment via /iterate to standardize on bronze_GlobalSupplyShares in § Orchestration (L626).

items.title: Data-quality observability third table named two ways in spec
items.description: spec_v1.md names the third data-quality observability table gold_quality_snapshot in § Current State (L880) but gold_low_confidence_audit in § Data Quality (L1097) — readers can't tell which Delta table exists.
items.fix_one_liner: Spec amendment via /iterate to standardize the third observability table name (task-018-anchored gold_low_confidence_audit is better-provenanced); confirm against what task-018 built.

items.title: silver_WB vs silver_wb casing drift in spec
items.description: spec_v1.md writes the World Bank silver table silver_WB in most sections but silver_wb in the gold-dimension source notes (L530, L570) — cosmetic (Spark is case-insensitive) but reads as inconsistency in a portfolio spec.
items.fix_one_liner: Spec amendment via /iterate to standardize on silver_WB at § Data Architecture L530 and L570.
